title: Hello Harmozi
name: HelloHarmozi
author: Carmelo Santana
description: A random Alex Hormozi quote in your footer. A Hello Dolly homage.

title: ModMenu
name: ModMenu
author: Carmelo Santana
description: A standalone plugin manager: browse, install, upload, enable/disable, update, and uninstall Kanboard plugins.

title: Shadcn Theme
name: ShadcnTheme
author: Carmelo Santana
description: Modern Kanboard theme inspired by shadcn/ui design principles with light/dark mode toggle and system preference detection.

title: Bulk Project Delete
name: BulkProjectDelete
author: Carmelo Santana
description: Bulk-delete multiple projects in one action.

title: Feature Sync
name: FeatureSync
author: Carmelo Santana
description: Bulk-copy project features (actions, tags, columns, categories, swimlanes) from a source project to many target projects, with add-missing and replace modes and a read-only diff preview.

title: Subtask Generator
name: SubtaskGenerator
author: Carmelo Santana
description: Generate subtasks from a task description using an AI provider (Anthropic, OpenAI, or Grok).
